behaviors.description: Speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels for attendee attribution downstream.
behaviors.justification: Failure depends on real speech-to-text model output quality (whether labels are correctly preserved), which a stub would hide. Rejected Workflow: behavior text targets one model-output property (label preservation), not a required sequence of multiple model decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real audio sample with multiple speakers through the real STT API, then assert transcript segments include correct speaker labels and those labels are still present in the object passed to summarization.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into summary-input structure.
behaviors.justification: This behavior is parser logic over provided transcript text/segments and output schema fields; no real OS/network/subprocess or model judgment is required. Rejected Integration: behavior text is about extraction logic itself, not a cross-module invariant.
behaviors.test_description: Feed parser fixture transcripts containing explicit assignments (including edge phrasing) and assert extracted items contain correct assignee and task text fields.

behaviors.description: Live summary includes at least one action item per attendee who was assigned a task.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM summarization decisions (coverage/completeness per attendee). Deterministic mocks can always satisfy the rule and miss true model failures. Rejected Workflow: this can be validated from one real summarization step over a prepared transcript.
behaviors.test_description: Provide a transcript with known per-attendee assignments to the production summarization call and assert output action-items section has at least one item for each assigned attendee.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction routing places identified decisions into the `decisions` schema field, not narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: Behavior text says 'identified decisions' and tests routing logic into schema fields, which is deterministic mapping logic. Rejected Integration: no required real infra or model-output dependence is specified for this routing step.
behaviors.test_description: Given an intermediate structure containing identified decisions plus narrative text, run routing/formatter function and assert decisions land only in `decisions` and are absent from generic narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key transcript decisions appear in live summary `decisions` section rather than only narrative text.
behaviors.justification: This checks whether the real summarizer model correctly identifies and places decisions; mocked outputs would hide misclassification/placement failures. Rejected Workflow: behavior can be evaluated from a single real summary generation over transcript input.
behaviors.test_description: Use transcripts with explicit decision statements, call real summarization, and assert each key decision is represented in `decisions` with semantic match, not only in free-form narrative.

behaviors.description: For audio longer than 60 minutes, service segments input, processes sequentially, and merges into one coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: This behavior is inherently multi-step with repeated AI processing across segments plus merge. Real failures emerge from step-to-step handoff, ordering, and cross-segment coherence; single-step or mocked tests miss these.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real >60-minute recording through production segmentation path, verify ordered sequential segment processing occurred, then validate final merged summary preserves cross-segment continuity, action items, and decisions without duplication/loss.

behaviors.description: End-to-end pipeline (upload, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes automatically for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires full pipeline completion with real recording and external AI calls, spanning multiple agentic steps and system boundaries. Lower levels cannot expose orchestration failures across the entire chain.
behaviors.test_description: Execute an end-to-end run with a real meeting audio file in a production-like environment; assert successful upload, transcription, summary generation, schema-valid output delivery, and no manual retries/intervention.
